card.name: Vulpes Traveler
card.text: {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Lightbound Songwriter
card.text: When Lightbound Songwriter enters, you gain 1 life and transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.)

card.name: Fairy Guide
card.text: Flying [1/1] [level 5] (As long as you have 5 or more Anima counters, this creature has this ability) Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may pay {2}{U}. If you do, target creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Transcended Chimera
card.text: Flying, haste As you cast this spell, each nonland permanent phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) [8/8] [level 15] This creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Vital Magic
card.text: You gain 4 life. Transcend 2. (You get 2 Anima counters.)

card.name: Etherbound Fantasy
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Until end of turn, enchantments you control gain indestructible and hexproof. If this spell was kicked, transcend X, where X is the number of enchantments you control. (You get X Anima counters.)

card.name: Wisteria of Evolution
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, proliferate if you gained life this turn. Then proliferate for each 4 life you gained this turn. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Void Spawn
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Medieval General
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 red Human Soldier creature token.

card.name: Fallen Wings
card.text: Flying {T}: Add {G}{G}. Activate only if this creature has one or more finality counters on it. Redemption—Pay 2 life (When this creature dies, if it had no finality counter on it, you may pay 2 life. If you do, return it onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it.)

card.name: Yuvoth's Influence
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste. [level 5] (As long as you have 5 or more Anima counters, this spell has this ability) Create a treasure token. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Demonic Conqueror
card.text: Deathtouch {B}, exile a creature card from your graveyard: Create a 3/3 black Zalkrein creature token with menace. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Zalkrein SYR
card.text: Menace

card.name: Skies of Annihilation
card.text: Exile all permanents that are white or green. For each opponent with 10 or more Anima counters, they create a treasure token for each permanent exiled this way.

card.name: Veluryia, Gracious Wilderness
card.text: You may play this land from your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G}, {W} or {U}. Spend this mana only to cast Empyrean, Angel, Faunid or Elf spells.

card.name: Bradchel, Technocracy
card.text: You may play this land from your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W}, {U} or {R}. Spend this mana only to cast Human spells.

card.name: Fluffy Druid
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.) [1/1] [level 4] (As long as you have 4 or more Anima counters, this creature has this ability) {T}: Add {G}{G}.

card.name: Serenra, Natural Home
card.text: You may play this land from your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R}, {G} or {W}. Spend this mana only to cast Faunid or Elf spells.

card.name: Zalkrys, Voidborn Territory
card.text: You may play this land from your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U}, {B} or {R}. Spend this mana only to cast Zalkrein or black spells.

card.name: Snow Huntress
card.text: Reach

card.name: Vaeka, Animal Civilization
card.text: You may play this land from your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G}, {U} or {R}. Spend this mana only to cast Dragon or Faunid spells.

card.name: Deafening Roar
card.text: Target opponent can't cast spells this turn unless they discard a card. Draw a card.

card.name: Deathbound Grimoire
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player loses 1 life and draws a card. Then if that player is an opponent, they discard a card.

card.name: Sky Claw
card.text: Reach At the beginning of combat each turn, target creature with flying attacks if able. Whenever this creature blocks a creature with flying, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Faunid Nomad SYR
card.text: Bravery (A creature with bravery can block creatures as though they didn't have menace.)

card.name: The Mirror
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) At the beginning of your end step, create a token that's a copy of another target nonland permanent you control, except that permanent isn't legendary. If you have 15 or less Anima counters, sacrifice this enchantment instead. Cycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Forest's Flamebringer
card.text: Bleedmaker (Damage isn't removed from creatures during cleanup steps.) Flying, haste Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to target creature or opponent.

card.name: Razziel, Mist Puppeteer
card.text: Haste Whenever Razziel attacks create a 1/1 colorless Toy artifact creature token and put a +1/+1 counter on her. If damage would be dealt to Razziel, damage is dealt to target Toy you control instead. {0}: Change the target of a spell or ability targeting Razziel to target Toy you control.

card.name: Grievous Stray
card.text: Deathtouch If a creature you don't control would die, exile it instead. During each player's turn, that player may cast a spell from among cards exiled with this creature, and they may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

card.name: Sophisticated Denial
card.text: Choose one— • Counter target spell. • Counter triggered or activated ability.

card.name: Adventurous Beast
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you transcend for the first time each turn, add {W}.

card.name: Wild Mirage
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, choose one— • You gain 1 life. • Transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.)

card.name: Bismuth Rose
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each player draws a card. At the beginning of your upkeep, transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.)

card.name: 4th Wall Threat
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Whenever you cast a spell, target player darkens 2. If they can't, each player loses 2 life. (To have a player darken 2, that player removes two Anima counters from themselves)

card.name: Oblivious Kitty
card.text: If you would gain life, you gain that much life plus 1 instead. [1/1] [level 6] (As long as you have 6 or more Anima counters, this creature has this ability) {T}: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery and if you gained 2 or more life this turn.

card.name: Licia of the Insurging Seas
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {2}. If you do, remove a counter from target player, planeswalker or creature. Redemption—{3}{G}{U} (When this creature dies, if it had no finality counter on it, you may pay {3}{G}{U}. If you do, return it onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it.)

card.name: Purification Aura
card.text: Spells and abilities you don't control can't make you exile other cards from anywhere.

card.name: Essence Keeper
card.text: During your turn, you don't lose unspent mana as steps and phases end. When Essence Keeper leaves the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Ninetailed Flamemaster
card.text: Haste, bravery (A creature with bravery can block creatures as though they didn't have menace.) Whenever this creature attacks, it deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Pilot of the Skies
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control enters, transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.) {7}{U}, {T}: Create a 2/2 white and red Faunid Nomad creature with bravery. This ability costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control. (A creature with bravery can block creatures as though they didn't have menace.)

card.name: Lei Shai, Kitsune Temple Guard
card.text: Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield from your graveyard, choose one— • You gain 3 life. • Draw a card.

card.name: Vizzet's Quick Fighter
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Vizzet's Quick Fighter deals combat damage, draw a card.

card.name: Vizzet, Master of Duality
card.text: Flash When Vizzet enters, target nonland permanent phases out. If you controlled that permanent, draw two cards. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) {1}{U}{R}: Target creature you control gains bravery until end of turn. Activate only once each turn. (A creature with bravery can block creatures as though they didn't have menace.)

card.name: Entity Mirrorer
card.text: Whenever a token you control enters for the first time each turn, create a token that's a copy of it and you lose 2 life.

card.name: Night Prowler
card.text: Darken 1: Add {B} or {G}. Then each opponent loses 1 life. Activate only once each turn. (To darken 1, remove an Anima counter from you.)

card.name: Khi'kxi, Revolute Evolver
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Deathtouch If an opponent would get a counter, you get a counter of the same kind instead unless that player pays 3 life. Darken 14: Exile Khi'kxi and return it transformed onto the battlefield. (To darken 14, remove fourteen Anima counters from you.) --- (Back): Khi'kxi, Revolute Banisher

card.name: Khi'kxi, Revolute Banisher
card.text: Flying, deathtouch, first strike, haste When Khi'kxi enters, exile target nonland permanent. --- (Front): Khi'kxi, Revolute Evolver

card.name: Snow Creep
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if your devotion to black is greater than or equal to four. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.) Whenever you darken, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Abyss Traveler
card.text: Reach {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each black creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery and if an opponent lost four or more life this turn.

card.name: Mayhem Angel
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, each player transcends 1. (That player gets 1 Anima counter.) {2}, {T}: Target player sacrifices a nonland permanent unless they darken 1. (To have a player darken 1, that player removes an Anima counter from themselves)

card.name: Spiritualizing Sky
card.text: Non-artifact creatures you control are enchantments in addition to their other types. This is also true for non-artifact creatures you own that aren't on the battlefield.

card.name: Rejuvinating Heights
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for an enchantment card with mana value 3 or less, put that card in your hand, then shuffle. At the beginning of your upkeep, you gain life equal to the number of enchantments you control.

card.name: Merley, Beast Empowerer
card.text: Vigilance When Merley enters, create a 1/1 white Cat creature token with lifelink. Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ryuu, Empyrean Prayer
card.text: Flying You may cast enchantment spells from your graveyard. You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may play lands and cast enchantment spells from the top of your library.

card.name: Corrupted Savanna
card.text: Bleedmaker (Damage isn't removed from creatures during cleanup steps.) This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. {3}: This land deals 1 damage to target creature.

card.name: Use Knowledge
card.text: Draw a card. [level 5] (As long as you have 5 or more Anima counters, this spell has this ability) Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Mayel, Midnight Battler
card.text: Menace Whenever Mayel deals combat damage to a player, mill two cards. Untap him. {T}: Return target nonland card from your graveyard to your hand. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Icefood Huntress
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature attacks, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Hammer of Shatters
card.text: Bleedmaker (Damage isn't removed from creatures during cleanup steps.) {1}, {T}: Target creature you control deals 1 damage to target creature or player.

card.name: Cure
card.text: Kicker {1}{G} (You may pay an additional {1}{G} as you cast this spell.) Remove all damage from all creatures. If this spell was kicked, destroy all nonland permanents with bleedmaker.

card.name: Ruins Protector
card.text: Defender, protection from creatures (This creature can't be blocked, targeted or dealt damage by creatures.) When this creature enters the battlefield, shuffle target player's graveyard into its owner's library.

card.name: Ammo Reserve
card.text: Whenever one or more creature you control enters, put a stock counter on this artifact. {2}, {T}: Remove any number of stock counters from this artifact: Create that many Munitions token.

card.name: Travellers Campement
card.text: When fortified land is tapped for mana, choose up to two target creatures you control, they each gain +1/+1 for each artifact you control until end of turn. Fortify {3} ({3}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: History Escapists
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Human token and a Munition token.

card.name: Supply Manager
card.text: When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, create a Munitions token. {2}{R}, sacrifice an artifact: Target creature you control deals 2 damage to another target creature you don't control

card.name: Intrepid Fighter
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature deals damage to a creature, create a Munition token. At the beginning of your end step, return Intrepid Fighter to your hand.

card.name: Armed Outlookers
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens you don't control enter, create a Munition token. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever a token you control leaves the battlefield, scry 1.

card.name: Admiral's Squadron
card.text: First strike, vigilance When this creature leaves the battlefield, if it didn't die and it isn't a token, you may create two tokens that are copies of it. This creature crews vehicles as though its power were 2 greater.

card.name: Plasma Canoneer
card.text: Artifacts you control enter tapped. {3}, sacrifice an untapped artifact: Target creature you control deals 3 damage to another target creature.

card.name: Permanent Nomads
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create an Encampment token attached to it.

card.name: Zalkrein Poisoner
card.text: Deathtouch Pay 2 life: If an opponent has a counter, transcend 1. (You get 1 Anima counter.)

card.name: Zalkrys' Conqueror
card.text: Battle cry (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever another nontoken creature dies, you may pay 2 life. If you do, exile that creature and create a 3/3 black Zalkrein creature token with menace.

card.name: Yuvoth's Apparition
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each player sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. II — Each player may discard a card. Each player who didn't discard a card this way loses 5 life. III — Put target creature card from an opponent's graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Coming Clean
card.text: Flash Whenever a creature enters, until end of turn, it becomes a 2/2 Citizen with hexproof and lose all other abilities.

card.name: Quiet Pressure
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 3/3 black Zalkrein creature token with menace unless target opponent pays 2 life. Whenever a creature token you control dies, you lose 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Trapped By Your innovation
card.text: Triggered abilities of artifacts you control can't be triggered. Whenever a creature deals damage to you, you gain life equal to the number of artifacts you control, then sacrifice an artifact.

card.name: Will of Peace
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and is goaded. Whenever enchanted creature deals damage, you gain that much life. Escape—{W}{W}, exile two others cards from your graveyard (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Will of Silence
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+3, has deathtouch and is goaded. Whenever a creature that was dealt damage by enchanted creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Will of violence
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has indestructible and is goaded. Whenever you lose life, goad each creature you control. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Beastling summonning
card.text: Fateful hour — Choose one, you may choose both instead if you have 5 or less life— • You may cast up to one non-human creature spell this turn without paying its mana cost and as tough it had flash this turn. • Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two creature cards. Put those cards onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Heal Wounds
card.text: Until end of turn, prevent all noncombat damage that would be dealt to creatures you control this turn.

card.name: Magical Abundance
card.text: You gain 1 life for each creature you control. Draw a card. Whenever you cast an Avatar spell or you attack with an Avatar this turn, exile this card from your graveyard. When you do, it becomes foretold. Foretell {1}{W}{U} (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)

card.name: Trapped by the Darkness
card.text: Prevent the next damage target attacking creature would deal this turn. Target blocking creature you control gains deathtouch.

card.name: We Must Preserve!
card.text: You may exile three nontoken artifacts you control rather than paying this spell's mana cost. Creatures you control gain protection from each color until the end of the turn. You gain 6 life. (It can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything each color until the end of the turn.)

card.name: Guided By Destiny
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage, draw a card, then you gain life equal to the number of cards in your hand.

card.name: Radiant Soul
card.text: Enchant creature If damage would be dealt to enchanted creature, prevent that damage. When damage is prevented this way, target player loses that much life.

card.name: Death Upon
card.text: Exile target creature that was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Existence Shattering
card.text: Target creature deals damage to itself equal to its toughness. Damage can't be prevented this way. If this creature has indestructible, it loses indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Eldritch Encounter
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature becomes black, its base toughness and power becomes 3/3, is a Zalkrein in addition to its other types and gains menace.

card.name: Prize Protection
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, if it was cast, each opponent creates a token that is a copy of it. When this artifact enters, choose a creature. Chosen creature has protection from monocolor. (This permanent can't be targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything monocolor.)

card.name: Lysa, Yps Biggest Fan
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control more artifacts than your opponents, draw a card. Then if you control an artifact with the highest mana value among other artifacts, draw a card.

card.name: George Yps, Master Crafter
card.text: Whenever George Yps, Master Crafter enters or attacks, create a colorless artifact equipment token named Spy Kit with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has all names of nonlegendary creature cards in addition to its name." and equip {2}. Activated abilities of artifact tokens you control cost {2} less to activate.

card.name: Mary, Army Admiral
card.text: Flash, vigilance If another attacking creature you own would die, return it to your hand instead of putting it into your graveyard.

card.name: Zalkrein Fear
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control a legendary creature, put a +1/+1 counter and a menace counter on target creature. It becomes black, its base toughness and power becomes 3/3 and is a Zalkrein in addition to its other types.

card.name: Take Possession for Money
card.text: (You may cast a legendary instant only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker) Counter target permanent spell. Put that card on the battlefield under your control instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. Its controller creates three treasure tokens.

card.name: Mortuary of the Dread
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}, pay 1 life: Add {U} or {B}. {2}, {T}, sacrifice a creature: Mill two cards, then draw two cards.

card.name: Zalkrein's Refuge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}, pay 1 life: Add {R} or {B}. {3}{B}, {T}: Create a 3/3 black Zalkrein creature token with menace.

card.name: Approaching the Negotiations
card.text: Any opponent may have you gain control of target noncreature permanent they control. For each opponent who does, they draw two cards. Draw a card for each permanent you control but don't own.

card.name: Armed and Loaded
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact. Armed and Loaded deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell's additional cost was paid, Armed and Loaded deals 6 damage instead.

card.name: Central Overcharge
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {4} or tap two untapped artifacts you control. Central Overcharge deals 6 damage divided as you choose among one, two, or three target creatures.

card.name: Key to Success
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate, Town, and Nation you control. Draw five cards. You gain 5 life. Create a number of Munition tokens equal to the number of lands you control. Add {U}{U}{R}{R}{W}{W} to your mana pool.

card.name: Market Trading
card.text: Exchange control of target artifact you don't control with target artifact you control. If you cast this card from your graveyard, this spell deals damage to target player or creature equal to the number of artifacts you control. Flashback {4}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Scatter and Deploy
card.text: Raid — Create a food token for each creature you control. Then if you attacked with three or more creature this turn, create a tapped treasure token for each creature that attacked this turn.

card.name: Slow and Steady
card.text: Target creature you control gains skulk until end of turn. When it becomes tapped this turn, investigate. (That creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Spy Kit SYR
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has all names of nonlegendary creature cards in addition to its name. Equip {2}

card.name: Encampment SYR
card.text: The first time fortified land becomes tapped for mana, you gain 1 life for each color produced this way. Fortify {3} ({3}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Javed, Diplomat
card.text: Whenever a Nation enters the battlefield from your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Tap target creature you control: Mill four cards. You gain that much life.

card.name: Traveling Season
card.text: Whenever a Nation you control enters, draw a card. {G}{G}, tap target Nation you control: Create two Food tokens.

card.name: World Remodeler
card.text: When World Remodeler enters the battlefield, create two Lander tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrificie this token: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.") Whenever a land enters the battlefield from your graveyard, create a 3/3 black Zalkrein creature token with menace.

card.name: Vulpah, Kitsune Descendent
card.text: Battle cry, lifelink (Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Other creatures you control have battle cry and lifelink. Whenever a creature you control deals damage to a player or planeswalker, untap that creature.
